steps.title: Find the GCF
steps.content:
Lowest power of $x$ across $7x^6,\ -2x^5,\ 9x^4$ is $x^4$. Factor it out:
$$7x^6 - 2x^5 + 9x^4 = x^4(7x^2 - 2x + 9)$$

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
The expression $x^4(7x^2 - 2x + 9)$ is choice B.

Choice A, $x^5(7x - 2)$, drops the $9x^4$ term. Choice C, $9x^4(7x^2 - 2x + 1)$, has an extra outer factor of $9$. Choice D, $2x^6(-2x^5 + 9x^4 + 1)$, does not factor out the common factor. That leaves B.
